_comment: Base items for HOLLOWFANE v0.3.0. Spec §4.4 calls for 10 slots; the v0.3.0 spike only wires the weapon slot (the inventory grid + paper-doll arrives Week 4, then the remaining slots can be filled in without code changes). base_damage is the floor before affixes; ilevel is used by LootRoller to gate which bases drop from a monster of a given level.
